headline: Stryker launches SmartHospital Platform
summary: Stryker (NYSE:SYK), a global leader in medical technologies, today announced its new SmartHospital Platform, a digital foundation designed to connect devices, data and care teams across the hospital into one intelligent, adaptive ecosystem. The launch comes ahead of the 2026 HIMSS Global Conference & Exhibition and marks a significant expansion of Stryker's digital offerings.
